keyEvents.text: Mervin Lewis (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! St. Kitts And Nevis 1, Grenada 0. Tyreece Simpson (St. Kitts And Nevis) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Romaine Sawyers.
First Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 1, Grenada 0.
Goal! St. Kitts And Nevis 1, Grenada 1. Regan Charles-Cook (Grenada) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Kayden Harrack.
Tyreece Simpson (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kejorn Wattley replaces Dennis Flemming.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Tyquan Terrell replaces Mervin Lewis.
Substitution, Grenada. Keishon Clarke replaces Roman Charles-Cook.
Substitution, Grenada. Joshua Isaac replaces Parish Muirhead.
Goal! St. Kitts And Nevis 1, Grenada 2. Jermaine Francis (Grenada) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Regan Charles-Cook with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Grenada. Kimron Marshall replaces Myles Hippolyte.
Substitution, Grenada. Ethan Telesford replaces Kane Vincent-Young.
Substitution, Grenada. Zade Douglas replaces Regan Charles-Cook.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Nequan Browne replaces G'Vaune Amory.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Akanye Samuel-Francis replaces Tyreece Simpson because of an injury.
Goal! St. Kitts And Nevis 1, Grenada 3. Darius Johnson (Grenada) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Jermaine Francis with a cross.
Goal! St. Kitts And Nevis 2, Grenada 3. Romaine Sawyers (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Second Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 2, Grenada 3.

Second Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 2, Grenada 3.
